timestamp.description: Describes tme of request generation in RFC3339 format

bap_id.description: Describes subscriber ID of the BAP

transaction_id.description: Describes  a unique value which persists across all API calls

message_id.description: Describes a unique value which persists during a request / callback cycle.

version.description: Describes the version of transaction protocol being used by the sender.

action.description: Describes the Beckn protocol method being called by the sender and executed at the receiver.

bap_uri.description: Describes subscriber URL of the BAP for accepting callbacks from BPPs.

ttl.description: Describes the duration in ISO8601 format after timestamp for which this message holds valid

bpp_id.description: Describes subscriber ID of the BPP

bpp_uri.description: Describes subscriber URL of the BPP for accepting calls from BAPs.

status.description: This value indicates if the tracking is currently active or not. If this value is `active`, then the BAP can begin tracking the order. If this value is `inactive`, the tracking URL is considered to be expired and the BAP should stop tracking the order.

gps.description: Describes the GPS co-ordinates for live tracking

updated_at.description: Describes the updated timestamp for shared gps co-ordinates

_description.description: Describes the live location
Contains tracking information that can be used by the BAP to track the fulfillment of an order in real-time. which is useful for knowing the location of time sensitive deliveries.
